data.title: Katten Health Care Pro Kenya Woodruff Lauded for Leadership Excellence
data.description: In Dallas on March 12, 2026, Katten disclosed that Kenya S. Woodruff, the national chair of its notable Health Care practice and deputy general counsel, has been recognized as one of Modern Healthcare's 2026 Leading Women. Her outstanding leadership skills have earned her this prestigious accolade.

data.title: USA Cycling and Shokz Announce Three-Year Partnership
data.description: USA Cycling is thrilled to declare a new three-year partnership with Shokz, appointing the brand as the Official Headphones of USA Cycling until 2028. The collaboration, based in Colorado Springs, Colo., solidifies Shokz as the exclusive headphones provider for the organization.

data.title: Movandi CEO Maryam Rofougaran Named to Inc.’s 2026 Female Founders 500 for Building the Connectivity Infrastructure Powering the AI Era
data.description: Maryam Rofougaran, CEO of Movandi based in Irvine, California, has been selected for Inc.'s Female Founders 500 list for 2026. She has been recognized for her role in developing the connectivity infrastructure that is driving the AI era. This acknowledgment highlights her contributions to the industry and the company's success in the 5G sector. The Female Founders 500 list showcases Rofougaran's achievements among other leading women entrepreneurs, emphasizing her significant impact and leadership.

data.title: Media Advisory - NSCAD Rally
data.description: Workers at the Nova Scotia College of Art and Design, along with their supporters, will be gathering for a rally on March 13 at 11:00 AM outside NSCAD's Fountain Campus in Halifax. The strike involves members of the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) Local 3912. The Vice President of CUPE 3912 NSCAD, Lachlan Sheldrick, and the President of CUPE 3912, Lauren McKenzie, will be present for interviews. The rally will include striking workers, alumni, undergraduate students, labor movement representatives, and other community allies.

data.title: OP Labs, an Optimism developer, is laying off 20 employees to streamline focus amid Ethereum landscape changes.
data.description: OP Labs, the developer behind Optimism, is downsizing its workforce by 20 employees as part of a strategic move to streamline operations and adapt to changes in the Ethereum industry. This decision comes in light of recent shifts within the broader Ethereum landscape.

data.title: Steele Honda Announces Special Incentives During Drive Home A Winner Days Event
data.description: Steele Honda in St. John's, NL, is currently offering special lease rates to drivers as part of the Drive Home A Winner Days event. The limited-time promotion features attractive lease rates on select vehicles. This event presents a great opportunity for drivers in the region to secure favorable leasing terms.

data.title: Dave Schuette Joins DataJoint Board of Directors
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Houston, DataJoint, a company specializing in scientific data infrastructure for AI in regulated R&D, revealed the addition of Dave Schuette to its Board of Directors as an independent member. This move aims to enhance DataJoint's governance and strategic direction.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Dennis Chaumont of Edmond, Oklahoma Explains Homeowners Insurance Exclusions
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Edmond, Oklahoma, an article from HelloNation discusses the limitations of homeowners insurance policies. The piece, featuring input from Insurance Expert Dennis Chaumont, delves into the typical exclusions found in standard policies. It sheds light on what homeowners insurance does not cover, emphasizing important details for homeowners to be aware of. This informative article aims to guide individuals on understanding the potential gaps in coverage within their policies.

data.title: An InventHelp 123Invent Client Develops New Baby Bottle (LBT-9761)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2026, an inventor from Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, shared their motivation behind creating a new baby bottle. The inventor aimed to simplify the process of mixing baby formula with water. This vision led to the development of the innovative BABY BOTTLE IDEA. This invention is crafted to streamline the mixing process and enhance convenience for caregivers.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Indexes Fall On Oil Surge; Utilities Dominate Upside, Oil Giant Hits Sell Rule (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a 600-point decline due to a significant increase in oil prices. Dollar General also faced a decline in its stock value following poor earnings reports. The stock market today witnessed a drop in indexes due to the surge in oil prices, while utility stocks dominated the positive trajectory. Additionally, a prominent oil company triggered a sell rule amid the market fluctuations.
